title: Making a hit science video

steps: Accept and enjoy low productivity. a
Get accepted into a graduate program and start your PhD. This alone secures you a minimum of 50K views. a
Make sure the lab studies an organism no one wants to fund. a
If you are not gifted musically, just ask someone to record you doing research and talking about your experience. a
Run some gels. a Again, if not musically gifted, you can just run some gels, but use fake hands .
If you somehow failed at the above (wow, a true scientist - failure is your forte!) - do a postdoc. . a
creator: Lenny Teytelman
